sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 250 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 25. 2. For orders on CMA 340/2023. 3. For hearing of CMA 341/2023. 4. For hearing of Main Case. 08.12.2025 Mr. Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the respondent. By consent, the impugned order is set-aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. The reference is disposed of. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge M. Khan
